logic.value:
This form is designed for employers who currently work with a benefits broker or consultant.

 This includes national or regional firms, local brokers, and platforms like Gusto, Rippling, or Zenefits, which may act as your broker of record.

 If you're not sure, you may continue — we’ll help you determine your setup.

Please review your submission.

Update any relevant information as needed.
How would you rate your broker’s value as a strategic partner?
1 = Just a vendor, 10 = Trusted strategic advisor
How would you rate your broker’s responsiveness and communication?
1 = Poor communication, 10 = Always quick and helpful
How would you rate your broker’s admin coordination and day-to-day support?
1 = Minimal help, 10 = Handles most admin tasks with ease
How would you rate your broker’s renewal strategy and plan benchmarking?
1 = Minimal support, 10 = Highly strategic and data-driven
Please upload any broker documentation you have (e.g., signed service agreement or CAA compensation disclosure).
Upload a clear, signed copy of your broker document (e.g., service agreement or CAA disclosure) in PDF, JPG, or PNG format.
How would you rate your broker’s compliance and documentation support?
1 = No support, 10 = Fully compliant and proactive
Made with Fillout, the easy way to make stunning forms
Which of the following services does your broker currently provide?
Broker Support & Services
How often do you have strategic or renewal meetings with your broker?
How often do you contact your broker for support?
Do you pay your broker any fees beyond commissions or standard premiums?
What type of broker, platform, or consultant supports your employee benefits?
Does your broker currently pay for or subsidize any of the following services?
Do you have a signed service agreement or only a Broker of Record (BOR) letter?
